# Agentify

> Agent Interface Compiler — One command. Every agent speaks your product.

Agentify transforms OpenAPI specifications into multiple agent interface formats with a single command. It is the only tool that generates MCP Servers, Skills, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .cursorrules, llms.txt, and A2A Cards from one source of truth.

## Quick Start

```bash
npx @agentify/cli transform https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/swagger.json
```

## Key Features

- OpenAPI 3.0/3.1 parsing with input sanitization
- MCP Server generation with security scanning
- Tiered generation strategy: small (<30 endpoints), medium (30-100), large (100+)
- Context-window aware: avoids the "93 tools = 55K tokens" problem
- Multiple output formats from a single OpenAPI spec

## Output Formats

- MCP Server: Model Context Protocol server with tools, handlers, and Dockerfile
- Skills: Agent instruction files for Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, and 30+ platforms
- CLAUDE.md: Project context for Claude Code
- AGENTS.md: Universal agent instructions (Agentic AI Foundation standard)
- .cursorrules: Cursor IDE agent rules
- llms.txt: LLM-readable documentation
- A2A Card: Google Agent-to-Agent protocol discovery card

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/koriyoshi2041/agentify
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@agentify/cli
